description: The final workshop of the Binance Africa Hackathon features Jan from the Binance NFT team discussing the upcoming Binance NFT Marketplace, set to launch in 12 days. The session covers the marketplace's features, including global visibility, lower fees, and a user-friendly interface for creators and buyers. Special announcements include an NFT giveaway designed for Africa, incorporating iconic national imagery.
topic_summary: Workshop on Binance NFT Marketplace with Jan from Binance NFT team, discussing features, benefits, and an NFT giveaway [t=0:24-4:55].
